title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Emami - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Emami - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Emami has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Emami:
Emami is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
